roa.docketEntryComment: DFT'S MOT (VIA ADD TO CAL) REFER TO SWAP FILED

/CAL:DEFENDANT TO SURRENDER/X:NO APPEREANCE BY COUNSEL OF RECORD,/DEF:SURRENDERED IN OPEN COURT TO SERVE THE REMAINING BALANCE SET ON 08-16-12, DEFENDANT IS TO SERVE 40 DAYS IN COUNTY JAIL WITH 7 DAYS OF CREDIT,/BE/
/CAL:TO SET DA MTR HEARING/MTR-DA/DEFT ADV/DEFT ADM VIO/REVSA:08-06-12/REIN ORIG TC/PROB MOD/PJ: 40 DAYS/ADDL CTS:7/PROB EXT:10-13-14/4019HALF/CONTD:FOR DEFENDANTS SURRENDER/DOP/

/DAWT/CAL:PTD PROGRESS REPORT RE RESTITUTION/CTORD:MATTER OFF CALENDAR FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON:THERE IS NO RESTITUTIONOWED IN THIS MATTER AS ALL THREE VICTIMS ARE NOT SEEKING RESTITUTION, DEFEENDANT HAS COMPLETED ALL PROGRAM REQUIREMENTS PER PTD /

/TWS/CH1:ISS:CPROB:PROB 3 Y:PJ 8D/CTS:8/WS/CTORD:FORFEITURE OF SEIZED FUNDS IN THE AMOUNT OF $7,815,00/X:THE DISTRICT ATTORNEY HAS AGREED TO ALL FINES AND PENALTIES AND RESTITUTION TO BE SATISFIED BY THE FORFEITED AMOUNT INCASE OF ANY DISPUTE THE MATTER TO BE BROUGHT BACK TO COURT/CTORD:THAT PORTION OF THE SEIZED FUNDS TO SATISFY ALL FINES, FEES, PENALTIES, AND RESTITUTION TO BE MADE PAYABLE TO THE SUPERIOR COURT COMPREHENSIVE COLLECTIONS UNIT/VF1/MPROBFINE/SECFEE40/ICNA/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/
/AMEND:TO REDUCE COUNT 1 TO A MISDEMEANOR/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST &CITZ RTS ENT PLEA(S) OF NL/DEFT ADV NL:1/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/IBARRA/REMA/
/CAL:SPRELIG RPT/SPRGR/X:CONDITIONS ON SPR;PARTICIPATE IN SUBSTANCE ABUSETREATMENT,REPORT 5X WKLY IN PERSON AND JOB TRAINING PROGRAM/VD:09-28-11/CONTD:PRELIM HRG/DOP/
